title: Soulection Radio Show #412
content:
Joe is back from his Asia trip with a crate full of rare tracks.

<!--more-->

Find out more about [Joe's Travels](http://www.joekay.com/travels) on [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/joekaytravels/), and [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-Rr8WaZYXOkrnJVQg1AZhw)
